atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of diabetes

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports forgetting to check his blood sugars frequently

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports enjoying ice cream regularly

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a possible MCL tear in his right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes Mobic for pain relief and inflammation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes metformin to refill the patient's prescription

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a straight leg brace for the patient's right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI of the right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a hemoglobin A1c to monitor diabetes control
